suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider making the 'git add -A' prohibition more prominent or adding it to worker skill procedures. Workers continue to use 'git add -A' despite the explicit AGENTS.md rule. Reinforcing in skill definitions or adding a pre-commit check would prevent this.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-data-bridge-polish worker used 'git add -A' in their commit flow despite AGENTS.md line 102 prohibiting it. No harm occurred (only expected files in commit), but the pattern persists across workers.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md XSS convention exists and was followed correctly for the fix. Good alignment.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — positive confirmation that the existing XSS prevention convention is working; no action needed
